name: @personal-context/cli
description: PCP CLI - Personal Context Protocol command-line interface

scripts.build: yarn workspace @personal-context/shared build && tsc && cp -r src/templates dist/templates
scripts.dev: sh -c 'yarn workspace @personal-context/shared run dev & SHARED_PID=$!; trap "kill $SHARED_PID" EXIT INT TERM; tsc --watch'
scripts.dev:relink-global: echo '⚠️  This will overwrite the global sb symlink to point at THIS worktree.' && echo '   Press Ctrl+C to cancel, or wait 3s to continue...' && sleep 3 && yarn workspace @personal-context/shared build && tsc && cp -r src/templates dist/templates && chmod +x dist/cli.js && mkdir -p "$HOME/.pcp/bin" "$HOME/.local/bin" && ln -sf "$(pwd)/dist/cli.js" "$HOME/.pcp/bin/sb" && ln -sf "$HOME/.pcp/bin/sb" "$HOME/.local/bin/sb" && echo "✓ sb linked: $HOME/.pcp/bin/sb (compat: $HOME/.local/bin/sb)" && if ! printf '%s' ":$PATH:" | grep -q ":$HOME/.pcp/bin:" && ! printf '%s' ":$PATH:" | grep -q ":$HOME/.local/bin:"; then echo "⚠️  PATH warning: neither $HOME/.pcp/bin nor $HOME/.local/bin is in PATH"; echo "   Add one of them in your shell profile so 'sb' resolves in new shells."; fi && sh -c 'yarn workspace @personal-context/shared run dev & SHARED_PID=$!; trap "kill $SHARED_PID" EXIT INT TERM; tsc --watch'
scripts.install:cli: chmod +x dist/cli.js && mkdir -p "$HOME/.pcp/bin" "$HOME/.local/bin" && ln -sf "$(pwd)/dist/cli.js" "$HOME/.pcp/bin/sb" && ln -sf "$HOME/.pcp/bin/sb" "$HOME/.local/bin/sb" && echo "Linked: $HOME/.pcp/bin/sb → dist/cli.js (compat: $HOME/.local/bin/sb)" && node -e "var p=process.env.PATH||'';if(!p.includes(process.env.HOME+'/.pcp/bin')&&!p.includes(process.env.HOME+'/.local/bin')){console.log('\u26a0\ufe0f  PATH warning: neither ~/.pcp/bin nor ~/.local/bin is in PATH');console.log('   Add one of them in your shell profile so sb resolves in new shells.')}"
